revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:橘樹神社]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: ページ [[橘樹神社]] を [[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] へ移動
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]]

revision.comment: 親王任国の二宮と村の鎮守が同格とが思えないのですが？（なお子母口の橘樹神社は今でも村の鎮守で神主すら常駐していません）
本文と重複し[[Wikipedia:曖昧さ回避|曖昧さ回避]]項目には過剰な記述を整理。
revision.text:
'''橘樹神社'''（たちばなじんじゃ）
*[[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] - [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]にある神社。[[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]の創建とされ、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]、[[上総国]][[一宮|二宮]]、橘神社とも、明治以降の[[社格]]は[[近代社格制度#諸社|県社]]。[[弟橘媛]]を祀る。
*[[橘樹神社 (川崎市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[高津区]]子母口（旧[[武蔵国]][[橘樹郡]]）にある神社。
{{aimai}}

'''橘樹神社'''（たちばなじんじゃ）
*[[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] - [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]にある神社。[[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]の創建とされ、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]、[[上総国]][[一宮|二宮]]、橘神社とも、明治以降の[[社格]]は[[近代社格制度#諸社|県社]]。[[弟橘媛]]を祀る。
*[[橘樹神社 (川崎市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[高津区]]子母口（旧[[武蔵国]][[橘樹郡]]）にある神社。
*[[橘樹神社 (横浜市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[保土ヶ谷区]]天王町にある神社。「天王様」。
{{aimai}}

'''橘樹神社'''（たちばなじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] - [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]鎮座。[[日本武尊]]の創建とされ、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]、[[上総国]][[一宮|二宮]]、橘神社とも、明治以降の[[社格]]は[[近代社格制度#諸社|県社]]。[[弟橘媛]]を祀る。 *[[橘樹神社 (横浜市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[保土ヶ谷区]]天王町鎮座。「天王様」 *[[橘樹神社 (川崎市)]] - 神奈川県[[川崎市]][[高津区]]子母口（旧[[武蔵国]][[橘樹郡]]）鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:たちはなしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''橘樹神社'''（たちばなじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。

*[[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] - [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]鎮座。[[日本武尊]]の創建とされ、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]、[[上総国]][[一宮|二宮]]、橘神社とも、明治以降の[[社格]]は[[近代社格制度#諸社|県社]]。[[弟橘媛]]を祀る。 *[[橘樹神社 (横浜市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[保土ケ谷区]]天王町鎮座。「天王様」 *[[橘樹神社 (川崎市)]] - 神奈川県[[川崎市]][[高津区]]子母口（旧[[武蔵国]][[橘樹郡]]）鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:たちはなしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]][[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:橘樹神社]]<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:橘樹神社]][[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:橘樹神社]][[ja:橘樹神社]][[category:kk]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:橘樹神社]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:橘樹神社]][[Category:qq]]

'''Tachibana Shrine''' (橘樹神社) refers to several [[Shinto shrines]].
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Mobara)|ja|橘樹神社 (茂原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Mobara, Chiba|ja|茂原市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}. It is an {{ill|Enshrined deity of Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳}} listed shrine, recognized as the {{ill|Second Shrine (Ninomiya)|ja|二宮}} of {{ill|Kazusa Province|ja|上総国}}, also known as Tachibana Shrine. After the Meiji era, it held the rank of {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. It enshrines {{ill|Princess Ototachibana|ja|弟橘媛}}.
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|橘樹神社 (横浜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja|保土ケ谷区天王町}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. Also known as "Tennō-sama."
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki)|ja|橘樹神社 (川崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja|高津区子母口}}, {{ill|Kawasaki|ja|川崎市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture, in the former {{ill|Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国橘樹郡}}.
{{Disambiguation}}

'''Tachibana Shrine''' (橘樹神社) refers to several [[Shinto shrines]].
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Mobara)|ja|橘樹神社 (茂原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Mobara, Chiba|ja|茂原市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}. It is an {{ill|Enshrined deity of Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳}} listed shrine, recognized as the {{ill|Second Shrine (Ninomiya)|ja|二宮}} of {{ill|Kazusa Province|ja|上総国}}, also known as Tachibana Shrine. After the Meiji era, it held the rank of {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. It enshrines {{ill|Princess Ototachibana|ja|弟橘媛}}.
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|橘樹神社 (横浜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja|保土ケ谷区天王町}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. Also known as "Tennō-sama."
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|橘樹神社 (川崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja|高津区子母口}}, {{ill|Kawasaki|ja|川崎市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture, in the former {{ill|Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国橘樹郡}}.
* {{nihongo|'''[[Tachibana Shrine]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]]'''|橘夫人厨子|Tachibana-fujin no zushi}}, A non-Shinto shrine found at [[Hōryū-ji]]
{{Disambiguation}}

'''Tachibana Shrine''' (橘樹神社) refers to several [[Shinto shrines]].
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Mobara)|ja|橘樹神社 (茂原市)}} - Located in {{ill|Mobara, Chiba|ja|茂原市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}. It is an {{ill|Enshrined deity of Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳}} listed shrine, recognized as the {{ill|Second Shrine (Ninomiya)|ja|二宮}} of {{ill|Kazusa Province|ja|上総国}}, also known as Tachibana Shrine. After the Meiji era, it held the rank of {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. It enshrines {{ill|Princess Ototachibana|ja|弟橘媛}}.
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|橘樹神社 (横浜市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja|保土ケ谷区天王町}}, {{ill|Yokohama|ja|横浜市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}. Also known as "Tennō-sama."
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|橘樹神社 (川崎市)}} - Located in {{ill|Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja|高津区子母口}}, {{ill|Kawasaki|ja|川崎市}}, Kanagawa Prefecture, in the former {{ill|Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国橘樹郡}}.
* {{nihongo|'''[[Tachibana Shrine]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]]'''|橘夫人厨子|Tachibana-fujin no zushi}}, A non-Shinto shrine found at [[Hōryū-ji]]

Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyōchō|" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|"
Text replacement - "Engishiki Jinmyocho|" to "Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|"
8 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:橘樹神社 up to rev 72307335
revision.text:
'''橘樹神社'''（たちばなじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*[[橘樹神社 (茂原市)]] - [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]鎮座。[[日本武尊]]の創建とされ、[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]、[[上総国]][[一宮|二宮]]、橘神社とも、明治以降の[[社格]]は[[近代社格制度#諸社|県社]]。[[弟橘媛]]を祀る。 *[[橘樹神社 (横浜市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[横浜市]][[保土ケ谷区]]天王町鎮座。「天王様」 *[[橘樹神社 (川崎市)]] - 神奈川県[[川崎市]][[高津区]]子母口（旧[[武蔵国]][[橘樹郡]]）鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:たちはなしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[橘樹神社]] to [[Tachibana Shrine (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}. It is an {{ill|Enshrined deity of Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enshrined deity of Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} listed shrine, recognized as the [[:en:Ninomiya|Second Shrine (Ninomiya)]] of [[:en:Kazusa Province|Kazusa Province]], also known as Tachibana Shrine. After the Meiji era, it held the Rank of {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. It enshrines {{ill|Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Princess Ototachibana|ja|弟橘媛|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Ototachibana|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|橘樹神社 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|qq=|1=Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11544301}} - Located in {{ill|Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja|保土ケ谷区天王町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]]. Also known as "Tennō-sama."
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|橘樹神社 (川崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja|高津区子母口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki]], Kanagawa Prefecture, in the former {{ill|Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国橘樹郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana District, Musashi Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}. * {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Mobara)|ja|橘樹神社 (茂原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Shrine (Mobara)|1=Tachibana Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11544302}} - Located in {{ill|Mobara|en|Mobara|WD=Q502486|lt=Mobara, Chiba|1=Mobara}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. Said to have been founded by {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}. It is an {{ill|Enshrined deity of Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enshrined deity of Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} listed shrine, recognized as the {{ill|Ninomiya|en|Ninomiya|WD=Q841389|lt=Second Shrine (Ninomiya)|1=Ninomiya}} of {{ill|Kazusa Province|en|Kazusa Province|WD=Q1055394|lt=Kazusa Province|1=Kazusa Province}}, also known as Tachibana Shrine. After the Meiji era, it held the Rank of {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. It enshrines {{ill|Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Tachibanahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Princess Ototachibana|ja|弟橘媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Ototachibana|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|橘樹神社 (横浜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|1=Tachibana Shrine (Yokohama)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11544301}} - Located in {{ill|Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja|保土ケ谷区天王町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennōchō, Hodogaya Ward, Yokohama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|WD=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. Also known as "Tennō-sama."
* {{ill|Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|橘樹神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja|高津区子母口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguchi, Takatsu Ward, Kawasaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki|1=Kawasaki, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture, in the former {{ill|Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国橘樹郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana District, Musashi Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
